title: macvaughiella standleyi
side_effects: Macvaughiella standleyi can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, allergic reactions, and liver damage. Overuse of the plant's extracts can lead to symptoms like nausea, diarrhea, and vomiting, while some individuals may experience anaphylaxis or skin irritation. In severe cases, improper use of Macvaughiella standleyi can cause liver failure, kidney problems, or even death. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid such adverse effects.
